name: Spotsylvania County Public Schools
districtFact: Spotsylvania County Public Schools serves families in the Fredericksburg region of Virginia, where many households coordinate the school calendar around A/B day schedules, transition day, conference nights, early releases, regional employers, I-95 travel, and nearby Northern Virginia districts.

about.title: About Spotsylvania County Public Schools
about.content: Spotsylvania County Public Schools serves students in Spotsylvania County, Virginia, in the Fredericksburg region south of Northern Virginia. The district publishes an instructional calendar with transition day, first day of school, student and teacher holidays, professional learning days, teacher workdays, grading-period dates, fall break, winter break, spring break, early release days, conference nights, and the last day of school. The district also publishes a separate A/B Day Instructional Calendar for families who need the alternating-day schedule in addition to the main district calendar.

about.title: How to Use This Spotsylvania Calendar
about.content: This page summarizes districtwide instructional-calendar dates from the official Spotsylvania County Public Schools calendar documents and provides a one-time calendar import for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook. Families should still confirm school-specific open houses, conference times, activities, athletics, A/B day details, and emergency schedule changes through SCPS and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Spotsylvania Families
content: Add transition day separately from the all-students first day because the district identifies those as separate start dates.
Track professional learning days and teacher workdays as standalone no-school weekdays, not only the major break windows.
Review early release dates near the end of the year because they affect pickup, after-school care, and transportation plans.
Use the official SCPS calendar page for amendments before finalizing travel or childcare plans.

compareIntro: Compare the Spotsylvania County school calendar with nearby Virginia district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

customSections.label: Important Notes for Spotsylvania Families
customSections.content: The 2026-2027 Spotsylvania calendar has several planning details beyond the first and last day of school. Families should track transition day, A/B day calendars, school-level open houses, conference nights, professional learning days, and early-release dates separately from the major break windows.

groups.label: Local planning checkpoints
items: Transition day is August 10, one day before the first day for all students on August 11.
SCPS publishes a separate A/B Day Instructional Calendar for families who need alternating-day schedule details.
Open house, back-to-school night, and conference night dates vary by elementary, middle, and high school level.
Early-release dates near the end of the school year affect pickup, transportation, and after-school care planning.

customSections.label: How We Reviewed This Spotsylvania Calendar
customSections.content: Reviewed by the MySchoolDates Editorial Team. The team checked the Spotsylvania County Public Schools 2026-2027 instructional calendar against the official district calendar documents before publishing this page.

groups.label: Review method
items: Checked the official SCPS calendar documents page and the published 2026-2027 instructional calendar PDF.
Cross-checked transition day, first day, last day, breaks, holidays, professional learning days, teacher workdays, conference nights, grading-period dates, early releases, and A/B day calendar links.
Kept the main instructional calendar separate from the A/B Day Instructional Calendar so families can choose the correct source.
Linked official SCPS sources and the correction process for families who need to verify later amendments or school-level changes.

districtFaqs.q: Which Spotsylvania calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the Spotsylvania County Public Schools instructional calendar, including transition day, first day, holidays, teacher workdays, professional learning days, breaks, early release dates, grading periods, and the last day of school.

districtFaqs.q: Does Spotsylvania list a separate transition day?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The SCPS instructional calendar lists transition day separately from the first day of school.

districtFaqs.q: Does Spotsylvania publish A/B day calendars?
districtFaqs.a: For 2026-2027, SCPS also publishes a separate A/B Day Instructional Calendar. This page summarizes the main instructional calendar and links the A/B day PDF under other official calendars.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute SCPS calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Spotsylvania County Public Schools calendar page and school-level announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with SCPS.

districtFaqs.q: Do Spotsylvania schools use the same calendar as Stafford County?
districtFaqs.a: No. Spotsylvania County Public Schools and Stafford County Public Schools are separate Virginia school divisions with separate instructional calendars, break schedules, and teacher workday dates.

relatedDistricts.name: Stafford County Public Schools
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Nearby Fredericksburg-area district north of Spotsylvania with a separate school year calendar.

relatedDistricts.name: Prince William County Public Schools
